name: 4-Bit Carry-Lookahead Adder
description: A 4-bit carry-lookahead adder (parallel carries), adapted from Tiny Tapeout's Apache-2.0 tt08_CSA_4bits (commit 213ea90), taken spec -> lint -> simulation -> GDS on sky130hd entirely through the platform.
highlights: Full flow to GDSII on sky130hd (OpenROAD/ORFS)
Timing met: WNS 0.0 ns; 41 std cells; 419 um^2
source_note: RTL adapted from Tiny Tapeout tt08_CSA_4bits (Apache-2.0, commit 213ea90); original self-checking TB; authored by dogfooding SiliconCrew locally.
